evidence: "What a beautiful story. The old Hollywood that will never return!"
"This is still one of my old time favorites. Great acting, breathtaking landscapes, wonderful music score..."
"This version is absolutely breathtaking, beautiful, stunning to look at..."
"A beautiful story of a time long gone."
"This film captures and reminds me so much of the old days at the 'hall.'"
"This is pure entertainment from beginning to end."
"The restoration is unbelievably spectacular and the sound in the ATMOS selection is clean, wonderful and crisp."
"Outstanding, breathtaking, incredible 5.1 stereo, beautiful costumes, wonderful musical actors..."
"...the beautiful sound track by Max Steiner, my favorite movie composer of all times..."
"I’m in my 60s and really like the old MGM musicals the best."
"The sound is basically mono until Dorothy lands in Oz. From that point on, you will be blown away."
"The restoration is even better than I thought it would be. Perfect picture and wonderful 5.1 sound."
"...the ending with the original casts, it was enough to make you cry. Pure magic."
"...you'll laugh and you'll cry and say I remember it well."

summary: The user has a strong preference for classic musicals and films, particularly those with high production quality and emotional depth. They appreciate the artistry of older films and express disappointment in modern productions, indicating a nostalgic connection to the past.
